title: Workplace exposure concern

examination.text: Supports recording suspected physical, biological, chemical, ergonomic or psychosocial workplace hazard type and affected work context without establishing exposure or causation.
examination.rationale: Relevant to categorizing a clinician-entered suspected hazard without confirming exposure or harm.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports recording suspected physical, biological, chemical, ergonomic or psychosocial workplace hazard type and affected work context without establishing exposure or causation.

exact_section.heading: Overview — types of workplace health hazards and programme scope
exact_section.locator: official HHE Program overview sections “Key points” and “Overview”

investigations.text: Supports documenting work process, job, timing, reported exposure, symptoms, reports, measurements, privacy and occupational-evaluation context without generating tests, findings or recommendations.
investigations.rationale: Relevant to documenting job, task, timing, symptoms, reports, measurements and privacy when actually known; it cannot generate findings.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports documenting work process, job, timing, reported exposure, symptoms, reports, measurements, privacy and occupational-evaluation context without generating tests, findings or recommendations.

exact_section.heading: Request and evaluation process — work, exposure, illness and privacy information
exact_section.locator: official HHE request page sections on request, site visit, medical information and reports

sources_used.title: NIOSH Health Hazard Evaluation (HHE) Program
sources_used.jurisdiction: United States occupational-health programme; not a UAE regulatory standard

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Job, task, hazard, route, date, duration, dose, PPE, symptoms, co-workers, reports and employer response are absent.
No exposure, causation, fitness, legal duty, test, restriction, compensation or referral is generated.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
